prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all files in `grafana/grafana` that form the CODEOWNERS infrastructure: 1. The actual CODEOWNERS file — the GitHub ownership definition. 2. CI workflows that validate CODEOWNERS. 3. Manifest generation scripts (JavaScript) that parse and index CODEOWNERS. 4. Go code that defines the `codeowner` type for feature management. 5. npm scripts that orchestrate manifest generation.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the grafana-observability fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all files in `grafana/grafana` that form the CODEOWNERS infrastructure: 1. The actual CODEOWNERS file — the GitHub ownership definition. 2. CI workflows that validate CODEOWNERS. 3. Manifest generation scripts (JavaScript) that parse and index CODEOWNERS. 4.
